validation_commands: npx markdownlint README.md docs/aw-ecc-core-bundle.md docs/aw-ecc-proof-surface.md docs/aw-ecc-security-posture.md .aw_docs/features/security-posture-guide/execution.md
key_findings: The repo already had security policy and security essays, but not a concise product-facing operating model for aw-ecc itself.
The biggest trust gap in onboarding was not missing security content, but missing placement of safe defaults near install and proof guidance.
Trust for aw-ecc now reads as a combination of safe runtime boundaries and deterministic stage evidence, not only catalog size or convenience.
